ground_truth.main_content:
David McIntyre Autobody Repair & Alloy Clinic, Coleraine - Contact Details: Tel: 07703 208604, Web: www.alloyclinic.com, Address: Unit 1 New Mill Industrial Estate, New Mills Road Lower, Coleraine, County Londonderry, BT53 2JR.

About David McIntyre Autobody Repair & Alloy Clinic:

Alloy Wheel Repair and Refurbishment: We are one of Northern Ireland's leading alloy wheel repair and alloy wheel refurbishment specialists. Alloy Clinic aims to deliver the highest quality and value for money. Cost effective repairs using quality and approved materials, we can equal manufacturer standards, enabling us to give you the highest quality available in re-manufactured alloy wheels. Our newly equipped facility in Coleraine provides us with the capability to offer alloy and diamond cut alloy wheel repair and refurbishment, powder coating and treatment of buckles and flat spots.

Alloy Wheel Repairs: We offer a range of alloy wheel repair solutions including rim repair, crack repair, scuff repair, buckle repair, scratch repair, corrosion repair, and diamond cut alloy wheel repair.

Alloy Wheel Refurbishment: We offer a range of alloy wheel refurbishment solutions including restoring, reconditioning, powder coating, painting, spraying, colour change (over 10,000 colours to choose from), and diamond cut alloy wheel refurbishment.

Diamond Cut Alloy Wheels: We offer a range of diamond cut alloy wheel refurbishment solutions including rim repair, scuff repair, buckle repair, scratch repair, and corrosion repair. Our specialist technicians operate highly advanced CNC Diamond Cutting lathes that create a unique polished finish to alloy wheels.

Auto Body Repairs: David McIntyre Body Repairs are Coleraine's premier accident repair specialists. From repairs to vehicle maintenance, our mechanics can help you with complete vehicle maintenance.

Car Body Repairs: As we are Coleraine's local car body repair specialists, our team can handle all your car needs from a scratch on the bumper to heavy accident damage repairs.

Accident repairs: Our highly skilled team will carry out a complete repair for a competitive price.
